params.name: Golden Monkey
params.description: This magnificent statue of a monkey is cast in pure gold carefully selected for its quality. It exudes an air of opulence, while showcasing intricate craftsmanship that brings out every detail, right down to the individual strands of fur. As a result, its value as a collectible has skyrocketed, captivating collectors from all walks of life!
